name: Sapporo Snow Festival
description: One of the most famous winter festivals in Japan, featuring massive snow and ice sculptures.

name: Aomori Nebuta Matsuri
description: A festival featuring enormous illuminated floats depicting mythical creatures and historical figures.

name: Carnival of Venice
description: One of the most famous festivals in the world, known for its elaborate masks and costumes.

name: Oktoberfest
description: The world's largest folk festival, celebrating Bavarian culture and beer.
